title: ASR Outdoor 10 Inch Bottom Riffles Gold Pan Gold Prospecting Equipment, Green
description:
A new addition to ASR Outdoors’ offering of gold prospecting pans, this 10 inch dual riffle gold pan features deep side wall riffles for capturing larger gold nuggets or valuable materials, which are complemented by micro riffles on the bottom of the pan, designed to capture fine specs, nuggets or flakes of gold. This high impact plastic gold pan is lightweight, easy to use and the most efficient gold panning tool to use today over traditional steel or other metal gold pans. It is molded from durable ABS plastic that is UV resistant, rust proof, buoyant in water and features a built in carabiner clip hole for easy portability alongside your other gold prospecting equipment

ASR Outdoor 10 Inch Bottom Riffles Gold Pan Gold Prospecting Equipment, Green

A new addition to ASR Outdoors’ offering of gold prospecting pans, this 10 inch dual riffle gold pan features deep side wall riffles for capturing larger gold nuggets or valuable materials, which are complemented by micro riffles on the bottom of the pan, designed to capture fine specs, nuggets or flakes of gold.

Key Features

  • BOTTOM RIFFLE GOLD PAN: Gold pan incorporates deep side wall riffles, complemented by micro bottom riffles, allowing for capture of both fine gold or larger gold nuggets and valuable minerals
  • HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL: Molded from one piece high impact ABS plastic, this gold pan is lightweight, rust and UV resistant and buoyant in water
  • PAY DIRT GOLD NUGGETS: Dual riffle gold pan technology allows for all sizes of alluvial gold particles to be efficiently collected without missing fine specs
  • PORTABLE AND LIGHTWEIGHT: Built in carabiner hole allows for gold pan to easily attach to backpack or gold prospecting equipment via carabiner clip or other
  • BEFORE USE: Gold pan should be seasoned before use by washing off all factory production oils

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 01G2301PG0
  • UPC: 810058488091
  • Color: Green
  • Size: 10 in

This high impact plastic gold pan is lightweight, easy to use and the most efficient gold panning tool to use today over traditional steel or other metal gold pans. It is molded from durable ABS plastic that is UV resistant, rust proof, buoyant in water and features a built in carabiner clip hole for easy portability alongside your other gold prospecting equipment. Use the deep riffles to rough out the raw material, finishing with the shallow riffles to make short work of your final heavy gold concentrates.

• Deep Large Riffles - Catch large gold nuggets before they wash away separating the black sand and gold from lighter colored sediments • Wide Belly Pan Bottom - Helps to clearly see the gold that collects in the bottom corners as it becomes separated from the remaining black sand, pay dirt or other materials • Micro Bottom Riffles - This unique pan features bottom micro riffles designed to capture fine gold flecks and small gold nuggets

This gold pan is great for practicing panning techniques, as well as extraction and recovery, as the specifically designed bottom micro riffles will capture small gold nuggets or flakes with ease. Suitable for new hobbyists or experienced gold prospectors looking to try out a new tool. Good luck!
